typescript.title: AnyFn
typescript.explanation: A generic function type for utilities that accept or return typed functions. Useful for memoize, debounce, throttle, and callback wrappers.
typescript.code: export type AnyFn<TArgs extends unknown[] = unknown[], TResult = unknown> = (...args: TArgs) => TResult;

typescript.title: VoidFn
typescript.explanation: A callback type for functions that do not return a useful value. Useful for event handlers, subscriptions, and side-effect functions.
typescript.code: export type VoidFn<TArgs extends unknown[] = unknown[]> = (...args: TArgs) => void;

typescript.title: AsyncFn
typescript.explanation: A generic promise-returning function type. Useful for retry helpers, API wrappers, async mappers, and background tasks.
typescript.code: export type AsyncFn<TArgs extends unknown[] = unknown[], TResult = unknown> = (...args: TArgs) => Promise<TResult>;

go.title: Goroutine
go.explanation: A lightweight thread managed by the Go runtime. It allows functions to run concurrently with other functions.

go.title: Channel
go.explanation: A typed conduit through which you can send and receive values with the channel operator, <-.

go.title: Struct
go.explanation: A typed collection of fields, used for grouping data together to form records.
